1:
this person doesn't want to provide for themselves and is ready to live off relatives or a spouse. Material matters come second. Money flows away and never lingers — a spendthrift. A tendency to let opportunities slip by. This doesn't mean the person is careless with money; they simply seek information more than prosperity. They miss their chances.
Recommendations: Control over money is essential, along with financial planning and learning to save. Practice thrift, cultivate qualities, build up the missing numbers. Normal for a woman; for a man it is a Life Purpose.
2:
a moderate coefficient that swings between extravagance and stinginess. This person remembers that they must work and earn, but does so without much pleasure, often lacking inspiration.
The key for such people is to understand that their work must bring them joy, otherwise their income may stagnate, earning only enough to cover basic needs. For the most part, these people are nonetheless wasteful. Given the chance not to work, they will gladly take it. Such a person is more interested in status than in pay. They remember that the family must be fed, but do it without much enthusiasm. If given the chance not to work, they will use it. With more motivation from management and the prospect of career growth, they will give it their all. Normal for a woman; for a man it is a Life Purpose.
3:
strong finances, but it can swing from calculation to extravagance. This person may save for a long time, denying themselves everything, and then spend it all, dropping down to zero or even into the red.
They see profit, can invest, and pursue passive income. It is very important for this person that they like their work — then they can work around the clock. Without a muse, the person may lie on the couch for years. Normal for a woman; for a man it is a Life Purpose. This person feels a need for money. They have a creative attitude toward money: if they like the work, they can work non-stop, but without inspiration they may lie on the couch for years. Without a certain sum of money on hand, they feel discomfort. That is why they too strive to see profit and know how to invest.
4:
a strong masculine financial combination. Rationality — the person sees and uses profit. These people know how to work, accumulate, and multiply. They are thrifty.
For a woman this can sometimes cause problems in personal life — loneliness, or a gentle man at her side — because such women are always financially well-off and attract men with lesser financial means or weaker character. The quality is off the charts. This shows that the person never misses their chance and also knows how to invest funds. The person cannot go a single day without work; for a woman, such an arrangement of numbers often gives rise to problems in personal life. Big ambitions mean big opportunities in the financial sphere. They can invest and pursue passive income.
5:
a strong masculine financial combination. Rationality — the person sees and uses profit. These people know how to work, accumulate, and multiply. They are thrifty.
For a woman this can sometimes cause problems in personal life — loneliness, or a gentle man at her side — because such women are always financially well-off and attract men with lesser financial means or weaker character. The quality is off the charts. This shows that the person never misses their chance and also knows how to invest funds. The person cannot go a single day without work; for a woman, such an arrangement of numbers often gives rise to problems in personal life. Big ambitions mean big opportunities in the financial sphere. They can invest and pursue passive income.
6:
a critical overload that manifests in two ways: 1) The person charges for every word they say (too thrifty, to an extreme).
2) The person works a great deal, scattering their energy and spending their health, yet never thinking about their material well-being. (working in vain, for pennies)
 The financial column consists of three important numbers: 
«4» — I can work 
«5» — I'm thinking of working for 5 cents or for $100. 
«6» — I can work even when I have no strength left. 
A person with just one number, but with the 5, has a greater advantage to succeed financially than a person with four numbers but without the 5. 
More numbers mean critical overload — the person either works and charges for every word, or works while squandering energy without thinking about material reward.
Exception: pay attention to which numbers make up the 2nd column.
